name: Maasai Treads Large Dog Bed - Light Blue
description: Maasai Treads Large Dog Bed-Light Blue Buy local, Build Local AND help save the environment. These skillfully crafted dog beds are made from old car tyres and lined with a soft Maasai shuka / sponge linging. The bed is infilled with a sturdy, removable cushion with a matching Masaai Shuka design
